name: core.openwop.workflows.lighthouse
description: Real-work workflow pack (RFC 0013, ADR 0149 / ADR 0155). The five zero-config 'lighthouse' workflows from the ADR 0149 catalog — Lead Triage, Account Brief, Renewal & Churn-Risk Digest, RFP Response, and Post-Meeting Follow-up. Authored over the feature node packs (feature.crm/kb/analytics) plus core.ai.chatCompletion, core.chat.approvalGate, and core.openwop.integration.*; every external send is gated by a human approval and all tenant-specific values are run parameters (replay-deterministic). Resolves fully on hosts that ship the feature packs (e.g. the OpenWOP reference app); on other hosts the unmet node types surface as a connect/install prompt rather than failing. Published under core.openwop.workflows.* (openwop-team signing key); the registry adds `signing` at publish time.
author: openwop
